queries.question: Show both housekeepers and laundry attendants who work at the hotel located at 789 River Road.
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseKeepers.FullName
FROM Hotels JOIN HouseKeepers ON Hotels.id = HouseKeepers.hotelId
WHERE Hotels.address = "789 River Rd"
UNION
SELECT LaundryAttendants.FullName
FROM Hotels JOIN LaundryAttendants ON Hotels.id = LaundryAttendants.hotelId
WHERE Hotels.address = "789 River Rd"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?hotels a :Hotels .
    ?housekeepers a :HouseKeepers .
    ?housekeepers p:hasHotels ?hotels .
    ?housekeepers p:name ?fullname .
    ?hotels p:address ?address_f .
    FILTER(STR(?address_f) = "789 River Rd")
    BIND(?fullname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?hotels a :Hotels .
    ?laundryattendants a :LaundryAttendants .
    ?laundryattendants p:hasHotels ?hotels .
    ?laundryattendants p:name ?fullname .
    ?hotels p:address ?address_f .
    FILTER(STR(?address_f) = "789 River Rd")
    BIND(?fullname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: List every housekeeper and also show the laundry attendants who work at the hotel located at 789 River Road.
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseKeepers.FullName
FROM Hotels JOIN HouseKeepers ON Hotels.id = HouseKeepers.hotelId
UNION
SELECT LaundryAttendants.FullName
FROM Hotels JOIN LaundryAttendants ON Hotels.id = LaundryAttendants.hotelId
WHERE Hotels.address = "789 River Rd"
